name: Sales Sequence Engine - Multi-Channel Coordinator (Smartlead)

nodes.name: Add Lead to Smartlead Campaign
nodes.notes: Adds the lead to the Smartlead campaign. Smartlead handles deliverability, warmup, inbox rotation, and actual sending according to its schedule. The email subject/body are passed as custom fields so Smartlead can use them in the campaign sequence.

nodes.name: Smartlead Reply Webhook
nodes.notes: Receives reply notifications from Smartlead webhook. Configure in Smartlead dashboard: Settings > Webhooks > Reply webhook URL = https://n8n-production-bb4b.up.railway.app/webhook/smartlead-reply-webhook

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ status: 'ok', email: $('Parse Smartlead Reply').first().json.fromEmail, sentiment: $('Parse Smartlead Reply').first().json.sentiment }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ status: 'ok', action: 'unsubscribed', email: $('Parse Smartlead Reply').first().json.fromEmail }) }}

nodes.name: Fetch Smartlead Campaign Stats
nodes.notes: OPTIONAL: Enable to pull Smartlead campaign statistics after each run. Disabled by default to avoid unnecessary API calls. Can be triggered manually or on a separate schedule.

notes:
PRIMARY outreach coordinator using Smartlead for cold email deliverability.

ARCHITECTURE:
- Sales sequence engine determines WHAT to send and WHEN
- Smartlead handles deliverability, warmup, inbox rotation, and actual sending
- On first run, creates a Smartlead campaign and stores campaign_id in Supabase (smartlead_campaigns table)
- Each email touch adds the lead to the Smartlead campaign with personalized content as custom fields
- Smartlead reply webhook notifies n8n of replies for sentiment analysis + lead status updates
- Business details (name, domain, category, value prop) are looked up dynamically from the businesses table using each lead's business_id

ENV VARS REQUIRED:
- $env.SMARTLEAD_API_KEY - Smartlead API key
- $env.SUPABASE_SERVICE_KEY - Supabase service role key

SMARTLEAD SETUP:
1. Create Smartlead account and get API key
2. Set $env.SMARTLEAD_API_KEY in n8n
3. Configure Smartlead reply webhook: Settings > Webhooks > URL = https://n8n-production-bb4b.up.railway.app/webhook/smartlead-reply-webhook
4. Create a 'smartlead_campaigns' table in Supabase: (id uuid, business_id text, campaign_id text, campaign_name text, created_at timestamptz)

Resend is NO LONGER used for cold outreach. Resend stays for transactional emails only (onboarding, churn-prevention, review-collector, cal-booking-handler, demo-lifecycle).

The cold-email-outreach.json Flow B (Email Sender) is DISABLED -- this workflow is the sole outreach coordinator.
